<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\Attributes; use Attribute; use PHPUnit\Runner\Extension\Extension; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_CLASS | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE)] final readonly class RequiresPhpunitExtension { /** * @var class-string<Extension> */ private string $extensionClass; /** * @param class-string<Extension> $extensionClass */ public function __construct(string $extensionClass) { $this->extensionClass = $extensionClass; } /** * @return class-string<Extension> */ public function extensionClass(): string { return $this->extensionClass; } }
